source: When we look at adult problem-solving skills , two things stand out : motivation and consequences . The motivation is why they have to go to work . They have to feed their family , they have to feed themselves . They work harder to have a nicer car , nicer clothes , to go out at night . These are motivations . The consequences are if they do n't get up and go to work , they lose their job . Over time , they lose many jobs and they wind up in trouble socially and economically .
domestication: 当我们审视成年人解决问题的能力时，有两件事格外显眼：动力和后果。动力是他们必须去工作的理由，因为他们得养家糊口，也得填饱自己的肚子。他们更加努力地工作是为了拥有更好的车，穿更好的衣服，晚上出去玩乐，这些都是他们的动力所在。而后果则是，如果他们不起床去工作，他们就会失业。长此以往，他们会失去很多工作机会，并最终陷入社会和经济困境。换句话说，成年人的动力来自于对美好生活的追求，而后果则是失去这些奋斗目标后的困顿。
foreignization: 当我们审视成人解决问题的能力时，有两件事脱颖而出：动机和后果。动机是他们必须去工作的原因。他们必须养活他们的家人，他们必须养活自己。他们努力工作以拥有更好的汽车，更好的衣服，晚上出去。这些都是动机。后果是如果他们不起床去工作，他们就会失去工作。随着时间的推移，他们会失去很多工作，并最终在社会和经济上陷入困境。

source: The Treasury announced on Christmas Eve , and therefore buried , the news that it will give blank checks to Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac for the next three years . In essence , the Treasury ( meaning you ) will pay the tab whenever Fannie or Freddie needs fresh capital . Rather than padlock these failed institutions and auction their parts , Treasury is weighing new cost estimates as high as $400 billion .
domestication: 圣诞节前夕，财政部宣布了一个消息，但随即就被埋没了：他们将在接下来的三年里给房利美和房地美开出空白支票。简单来说，这意味着每当房利美或房地美需要新资金时，财政部（也就是纳税人，你我）都会买单。与其关闭这些失败的机构并拍卖它们的资产，财政部现在却正在考虑新的费用估算，高达4000亿美元。这样一来，就像往无底洞里扔钱一样，不知道会耗费多少资金。
foreignization: 财政部在圣诞节前夜宣布，并且因此而掩埋了这样一则新闻，即将会在接下来的三年内给予房利美和房地美空白支票。实际上，财政部（也就是说你）将在房利美或房地美需要新资本时支付账单。与其封闭这些已经破产的机构并拍卖他们的资产，财政部正在考虑新的费用估算，其最高价格达到4000亿美元。

source: The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .
domestication: 联合国在未来全球社区中的作用非常重要。然而，联合国内部和全球面临的问题变得越来越复杂。随着世界的变化，联合国也必须跟进。举个例子：2001年12月29日，安理会就第1385号决议进行了投票。一国或一个人不应该拥有过多权力，以至于能单独否决决议，尤其是在秘密中进行的投票。这就造成了只有一个成员国与其他国家意见不一致，就足以推翻整个决议，这种情况下，是需要对决议进行修改的。安理会作为联合国的最高机构，却给予五常任理事国每个国家一票否决权，这实际上是在全球范围内制造了一种独裁的官僚制度，使任何一个常任理事国都能随意否决他们不喜欢的任何决议。

source: When there is a culture of secrecy within a closed group , information generated in and by those individuals can be kept within the confines of the group . This behavior may lead to public harm if a closed group keeps secret information that negatively affects other individuals who are not group members . When a public harm is a possibility , the group must install transparency so as to prevent that harm . While complete transparency might be extremely difficult , there does need to be some concession to candor and accountability . Lawyers , like many other professional groups , are commonly thought of as a closed group . We , like those in other groups , must be vigilant to maintain some transparency . In doing so , we protect and uphold the integrity of our profession while preventing harm to our clients and other citizens . This need for transparency is best illustrated through examples .
domestication: 当一个封闭的团体内部形成保密文化时，这个团体中产生的信息就可以在团体内部封闭起来。这种行为如果涉及对非团体成员个人的负面影响，就可能导致公共伤害。当公共伤害成为可能时，团体就必须引入透明度来防止这种伤害。虽然完全的透明度可能非常困难，但确实需要有一些坦率和问责制的让步。律师，像许多其他专业团体一样，通常被认为是一个封闭的团体。我们和其他团体一样，必须保持警惕以维持一些透明度。在这样做的同时，我们保护并维护了我们职业的完整性，同时防止对客户和其他公民造成伤害。这种对透明度的需求最好通过例子来说明。

domestication: 我们可以同意或不同意“单一付款人”是否是描述这种制度的合适词汇，但不可否认这是一个可行的模式。根据克鲁格曼的说法，这种模式依赖于私人保险公司，并通过监管和补贴的结合来确保每个人都能获得医疗保障。他还提到，“马萨诸塞州的医疗改革基本上遵循了瑞士模式”。至于奥巴马医改，“基本上它就是一个计划，要让美国走向瑞士化，通过监管和补贴来实现全民医疗保障。”这两种制度都有各自的特点和优势，我们不妨来分析一下。首先，单一付款人的优点在于，它能够更好地控制医疗费用，让医疗服务更加廉价和普及。其次，瑞士模式则更加强调竞争和选择，让个人有更多的自由去选择自己想要的医疗服务。

source: The list goes on and on . Perry 's chumminess with corporate donors accounts for the staggering $17 million his presidential campaign raised in its first six weeks , the single thing that has kept it afloat ; without that money , he would have had little staying power . But it 's not just money Perry receives in return . As a presidential candidate , he has taken scores of flights on his donors ' private jets . When The New York Times snooped into this , its reporters discovered that Perry 's cash reimbursements for these flights fell a quarter-million dollars short of what was required by law .
domestication: 这份名单还在继续。佩里的和企业捐助者关系亲密，这让他在竞选活动的头六个星期里筹集了高达1700万美元的资金，这是他竞选活动能够持续下去的唯一原因。如果没有这些钱，他早就退出竞选了。但是佩里获得的不仅仅是金钱。作为总统候选人，他曾多次乘坐捐助者的私人飞机。纽约时报调查此事后发现，佩里对这些航班的报销少了25万美元，远远低于法律要求的金额。

source: McCain is honest , sometimes brutally so , about his own failings and errors ; his description of the Keating Five affair is thorough and unsparing , as are his admissions of occasional prevarication and displays of temper . He is no less straightforward about his political experiences . While a dedicated conservative and a believer , his contempt for the near-fascist " Christian " wing of the Republican party is evident , as is his disgust with the treatment former Senator John Tower received when nominated by President George H.W. Bush for the post of Secretary of Defense , a nomination shot down more by far right wingers than by the Democrats . source: The United States linked the question of indemnization for U.S. copper companies with Chile 's multilateral foreign debt . That foreign debt , an inheritance from the obligations incurred by the Alessandri and Frei governments , was the second highest foreign debt per capita of any country in the world . Yet , in the 1972 and 1973 Paris Club foreign debt negotiations with Chile 's principal foreign creditor nations , the United States alone refused to consider rescheduling Chile 's foreign payments until there was movement toward indemnization for the U.S. copper companies . The United States also exerted pressure on each of the other foreign creditor nations not to renegotiate Chile 's foreign debt as a group .
domestication: 美国把赔偿美国铜业公司的问题跟智利的多边外债联系在一起。这种外债是阿莱桑德里和弗雷政府留下的包袱，是世界上人均外债第二高的国家。然而，在1972年和1973年的巴黎俱乐部外债谈判中，面对智利的主要外债国，美国拒绝考虑重新安排智利的外债付款，除非美国铜业公司得到赔偿。美国还对其他外债国施压，不让他们作为一个整体来重新协商智利的外债问题。这种做法使得智利的外债问题变得更加复杂和棘手。美国的强硬态度无疑增加了智利的经济负担，也让智利感到极大的压力。这种情况下，智利不得不面对着巨大的经济挑战。

source: 12 . Do I need to do anything in order to stay in my Original Medicare ? Nope . If you 're content with your Original Medicare coverage , you can sit tight as there are no changes for 2013 to consider , says CMS 's David Sayen . However , because Original Medicare does n't include a drug plan , it 's wise to review your Part D drug plans as the medicines they cover , the pharmacies they work with , and their premiums do change .
domestication: 12. 要想继续享受原有的医疗保险计划，我还需要做什么吗？根本不需要做什么。如果你对现在的医疗保险报销内容很满意，就算了，因为今年不会有变化，美国医疗保险中心的David Sayen这么说。但是，由于原有的医疗保险不包括药品计划，所以最好还是检查一下你的D部分计划，看看那些药品在计划之内，哪些药店可以使用，还有保费是否上涨。

source: Does sushi making rely more on cultural insight than making other genres of food to the highest standards ? source: The adoption of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights on December 10 , 1948 constituted a step forward in the slow progress towards protection of human rights . The overarching principle of the UD is universality . Its provisions have equal standing . There are no moral grounds for self-serving " relativism , " which selects for convenience ; still less for the particularly ugly form of relativism that converts the UD into a weapon to wield selectively against designated enemies .

source: On the national level , Tea Party Republicans ( and party leaders who fear them ) greeted Obama 's initial election by deciding that destroying him was more important than doing the best they could for the country . Will they greet his re-election as a warning to work with him toward solving problems ? One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .

One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .
在国家层面上，茶党共和党人（以及害怕他们的党派领导人）迎接奥巴马最初当选的方式是决定摧毁他比为国家做最好的努力更重要。当他再次当选时，他们是否会将其视为与他合作以解决问题的警告？我希望如此；我也希望，如果他们继续其顽固的立场，他们的选民会将他们看作他们所是的那样；但更有可能的是，如果奥巴马说天是蓝色的，共和党众议院议员会自动称天是红色的，然后试图指责他没有就天的颜色达成共识。

source: Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .

What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .
Victor并不认为地球工程技术可以独自解决所有问题，但他期望最终我们会得到一系列的解决方案。也许我们可以从向大气中添加几缕硫磺开始，以赢得时间，然后是海洋中的浮游生物森林，接着是基因工程改造的碳元素饥渴树木。 Victor说，现在没有选择的余地，就是拒绝为更多的研究提供资金，抱着地理工程不需要被采用的希望。

source: I married into a pink bathroom ! With the hidious mint green and floral wallpaper border it was obvious someone was more in tune to the 70 ? s and I 'll admit I was not a fan . However , with much thought and procrastination I 'm slowly transforming it . I hope to have a clean slate so that I can decorate and redecorate as I see fit with minimal effort , but also , if we sell this house , someone else wo n't be stuck with an awful bathroom . It 's one of the rooms in the house which everyone sees and since it 's our only bathroom I intend to not be overwhelmingly feminine ! I shall fight the urge , but keep the pink !

domestication: 从智利的例子来看，委员会值得认真考虑这样一种可能性：即将国家估计和行动的责任都交给同一个人——中情局局长，这种做法会产生固有的利益冲突和判断失误。这种制度设计可能会导致局长难以公正地做出决策，因为他既要对国家安全提出预警，又要负责执行相关行动，难免会有先入之见或偏见。

source: Many cultures , including the Mayas and the Incas , considered their rulers divine and tended to regard their ancestors ( particularly the founders of their political dynasties ) as sacred . Jurisdiction of district court . SEC. 6 . The district court shall be a court of law and equity , which shall be distinct and separate jurisdictions , and have jurisdiction in civil and criminal matters arising in their respective districts , in such manner as shall be prescribed by law . Statutory provision , 602.6101 of the Code
区法院的管辖权。第六条规定，区法院是法律和衡平法的法院，具有不同的和独立的司法权力，并且根据法律的规定，在其各自的地区对民事和刑事案件拥有审判权。具体来说，这是由《法典》第602.6101条所规定的。简单来说，就是区法院在法律和公平方面有独立的审判权，负责处理本地区内发生的民事和刑事案件。

地区法院的管辖权。第6条。地区法院应是法律和公平的法院，它们将是不同的且分开的管辖权，并在其各自的区域内根据法律规定的方式，对民事和刑事案件具有管辖权。法定条款，代码602.6101

source: We have a right to competent , honest lawyers in government . ( I know several and they are very intelligent , decent people ; I can not judge their expertise . ) We also have a right to pay for only one legal position from our government . Currently we often pay for both plaintiff and defendant . Thus my solution would be to cut the DoJ budget in half , every year , compounded , until the top echelons got their act together . In the private sector this is common , and effective . When Mr. Perez is terminated , loses his house in foreclosure ; it will flavor his legal theories .
domestication: 我们有权利享受有能力、诚实的政府律师。（我认识几个，他们非常聪明、品行端正；但我不能评判他们的专业水平。）同时，我们也有权利只为一个政府法律职位买单。目前，我们经常同时支付原告和被告的费用。因此，我的解决方案是，每年将司法部预算削减一半，采用滚存方式，直到高层领导整顿好自己的工作。在私营部门，这种做法很常见，也很有效。当佩雷斯先生被解雇，失去房子被查封时，这将使他的法律理论更有味道。
foreignization: 我们有权利拥有在政府中有能力、诚实的律师。（我认识几位，他们非常聪明，都是好人；我无法判断他们的专业知识。）我们还有权利只为政府的一個法律职位付费。目前，我们经常同时支付原告和被告的费用。因此，我的解决方案是将司法部（DoJ）的预算每年减半，复利计算，直到最高层的人把事情办好。在私营部门，这是很常见的，也很有效。当佩雷斯先生被解雇，失去房子被拍卖时；这将使他的法律理论更有味道。

source: The main purpose of the three UNCS will be support the international work of the United Nations . UNCS will be the home base for the United Nations Peacekeeping Forces as well as the training centers for United Nations operations . Governments from around the world could send their police and military personal for United Nations Certification as Reserved International Peacekeeping Personnel . The United Nations would maintain the fulltime United Nations Peacekeeper Forces .
domestication: 联合国城市的主要目的是支持联合国的国际工作。联合国城市将成为联合国维和部队的基地，也是联合国行动的训练中心。来自世界各地的政府可以派遣警察和军事人员到这里接受联合国的培训，获得国际维和人员的认证。联合国将维持常备的维和部队，这样就能随时应对全球的紧急情况。可以说，联合国城市是维护世界和平的重要堡垒，是联合国开展国际工作的重要依托。通过这样的方式，联合国可以更好地发挥其在维护世界和平方面的作用。
foreignization: 三个联合国城市的主要目的是支持联合国的国际工作。联合国城市将成为联合国维和部队以及联合国行动培训中心的所在地。来自世界各地的政府可以派遣他们的警察和军事人员前往联合国城市，以获得联合国的预备国际维和人员认证。联合国将保持全职联合国维和部队。

source: From 2005 to 2009 , I was Executive Head of the United Nations Development Program , headquartered in New York . In 2007 , I hired a new research analyst for my front office . She was a very bright young Turkish woman , perhaps about 25 years old . She was not from Istanbul , Ankara or Izmir , but from Samsun , on the eastern Black Sea coast in Anatolia . I went to her office to welcome her on her first day of work . She had not yet unpacked anything , the office was full of boxes , her table was empty and the walls were clear of posters or pictures . Clear , except for one picture which she had hung on the yet bare walls : a picture of Atatrk , of Mustafa Kemal Pa ? a .
domestication: 我从2005年到2009年间在纽约总部担任联合国开发计划署的执行主任。在2007年，我为我的办公室招募了一名新的研究分析师。她是一个非常聪明的年轻土耳其女人，大概二十五六岁。她不是来自伊斯坦布尔、安卡拉或伊兹密尔，而是来自安纳托利亚东部黑海沿岸的萨姆松。我去她的办公室欢迎她第一天上班，结果发现她的办公室还一片狼藉，满是未拆开的箱子，桌子空空荡荡，墙壁也没有任何海报或者照片。唯一引人注目的，是她已经挂在墙上的那一张照片：穆斯塔法·凯末尔·阿塔图尔克的照片。这就像是一道不成文的规矩，无论走到哪里，土耳其人都喜欢挂上阿塔图尔克的肖像，好像在告诉所有人：“我是土耳其人，我为我的国家感到骄傲”。
foreignization: 从2005年到2009年，我曾是总部设在纽约的联合国开发计划署的执行主任。 2007年，我为我的办公室雇佣了一名新研究分析师。她是一位非常聪明的年轻土耳其女人，大约25岁。她不是来自伊斯坦布尔、安卡拉或伊兹密尔，而是来自位于安纳托利亚东部黑海沿岸的萨姆松。我去她的办公室迎接她第一天上班。她还没拆开任何东西，办公室里堆满了箱子，桌子是空的，墙上没有海报或图片。清晰的，除了她挂在尚未装饰的墙上的那一张图片：一张阿塔图克的照片，穆斯塔法·凯末尔帕夏的照片。

The news could n't be better for Mitt Romney because it reported that the Miami Herald/El Nuevo Herald poll of likely voters showed the former Massachusetts governor leading Barack Obama in Florida by a comfortable 51 to 45 margin . However in the same edition of the Miami Herald there is also an Associated Press story stating that Obama " seems " to be leading in early polls in key states . Based on what ? Apparently based on pixie dust since virtually no real proof is offered .

source: " Winner of JournalStone 's horror novel writing contest , Brett J. Talley has written a wonderful homage to occult horror . Each of the stories told to our protagonist is unique and scary by itself while adding to the overall atmosphere and theme of the novel as a whole . Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian
domestication: 怪诞小说大奖得主布雷特·J·塔利在其作品中向黑暗神秘主义致敬。主人公听到的每一个故事都独树一帜，令人毛骨悚然，同时又为整个小说营造出一种诡异的氛围和主题。每个角色都刻画得惟妙惟肖，他们的个人故事也在最后巧妙地交织在一起。此外，书中还暗示了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克等人的作品，甚至连《圣经》也被提及。读起来就像是在品味19世纪和20世纪初最好的关于神秘仪式和古老、宛如神明般的怪物的恐怖故事。我非常期待布雷特·J·塔利的下一部作品，这是一部强烈推荐的好书。—— 蒙斯特图书管理员的库伦·王
foreignization: 《JournalStone》恐怖小说写作比赛的获奖者布雷特·J·塔利（Brett J. Talley）写了一篇对神秘恐怖的精彩致敬。每一个被讲述给我们主角的故事都是独特而令人恐惧的，同时也为整个小说的整体氛围和主题做出了贡献。每一个角色都被很好地刻画出来，他们各自的故事也美丽地融合在一起。小说中有对洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克和甚至《圣经》的引用，《不可存在的事物》（That Which Should Not Be）读起来就像19世纪和20世纪初关于神秘和古代神一样怪物的最佳恐怖故事。我期待着将来能够读到更多塔利的作品。强烈推荐。——科琳·王（Colleen Wanglund），怪物图书管理员

Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian

怪诞小说大奖得主布雷特·J·塔利在其作品中向黑暗神秘主义致敬。主人公听到的每一个故事都独树一帜，令人毛骨悚然，同时又为整个小说营造出一种诡异的氛围和主题。每个角色都刻画得惟妙惟肖，他们的个人故事也在最后巧妙地交织在一起。此外，书中还暗示了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克等人的作品，甚至连《圣经》也被提及。读起来就像是在品味19世纪和20世纪初最好的关于神秘仪式和古老、宛如神明般的怪物的恐怖故事。我非常期待布雷特·J·塔利的下一部作品，这是一部强烈推荐的好书。—— 蒙斯特图书管理员的库伦·王
